scope: Current Main Flow per-hand mask and strict body-contact asset audit.
review_basis: Visual inspection of active body_contact_slots base image and current hand/contact masks.
Hash comparison between active body_contact_slots base and candidate body_contact_presets sources.
Metadata audit of Main Flow nodes 999-1017 and 1051-1093.

media_reviewed.notes: Visual inspection showed a clothed adult-presenting single-subject lower-hip contact-style reference, not a two-character strict side-push source.
Mask is nonzero but combined/ambiguous; it does not establish Character A/B left/right per-hand identity.

checks.name: per_hand_mask_existence
checks.notes: Nodes 1051-1054 reference four per-hand mask files that are missing from active body_contact_slots.

checks.name: left_right_identity
checks.notes: Existing active mask is a combined contact-hand mask and cannot safely be relabeled as Character A/B left/right without Lane 1 semantics or a trustworthy source.

checks.name: same_scene_source_consistency
checks.notes: Available strict-v1 left/right masks use a different base hash than the active slot folder.

checks.name: final_generated_hand_quality
checks.notes: No new runtime generation was produced or reviewed.

checks.name: collision_and_soft_body_deformation
checks.notes: Depth/normal/pressure/indentation/occlusion assets exist and are nonzero, but runtime output and collision/deformation quality remain unproven.

limitations: Input/control references and masks were inspected; no final generated output was reviewed.
next_action: Lane 1 should decide the active preset semantics for nodes 1009 and 1051-1054 before Lane 2 materializes any missing per-hand masks.
